WANDERER-STRIKE_WANDERER.title: Strike
WANDERER-DEFEND_WANDERER.title: Defend
WANDERER-KAMAE.title: Kamae
WANDERER-KAMAE.description:
Enter a different stance.{IfUpgraded:show:
Draw 1 card.|}
WANDERER-ENTER_JODAN.title: Jodan
WANDERER-ENTER_CHUDAN.title: Chudan
WANDERER-ENTER_HASSO.title: Hasso
WANDERER-ENTER_GEDAN.title: Gedan
WANDERER-ENTER_WAKI.title: Waki
WANDERER-THRUST.title: Thrust
WANDERER-SLASH.title: Slash
WANDERER-WEAVE.title: Weave
WANDERER-WEAVE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} block.
Next turn, deal {Damage:diff()} to a random enemy.
WANDERER-DISENGAGE.title: Disengage
WANDERER-DISENGAGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Next turn, gain {BlockNextTurn:diff()} Block.
WANDERER-DIE_PERIOD.title: Die.
WANDERER-DIE_PERIOD.description:
This turn, attacks deal double damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Add [purple]Dishonor[/purple] to your deck.
WANDERER-DEATH_POEM.title: Death Poem
WANDERER-DEATH_POEM.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Plays automatically whenever ANYONE dies.
WANDERER-DISHONOR.title: Dishonor
WANDERER-TAKE_INITIATIVE.title: Take Initiative
WANDERER-FEINT.title: Feint
WANDERER-FEINT.description: Exhaust an attack and gain block equal to its damage.
WANDERER-PRESS.title: Press
WANDERER-PRESS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put Kamae into your hand.
WANDERER-YIELD.title: Yield
WANDERER-YIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} block.
Put Kamae into your hand.
WANDERER-FLOW.title: Flow
WANDERER-FLOW.description: Whenever you leave a stance, gain {FlowPower:diff()} block.
WANDERER-TORRENT.title: Torrent
WANDERER-TORRENT.description: Whenever you leave a stance, deal {TorrentPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-KEIKAKU.title: Keikaku
WANDERER-PREEMPT.title: Preempt
WANDERER-ARRIVE_LATE.title: Arrive Late
WANDERER-ARRIVE_LATE.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} weak and {VulnerablePower:diff()} vulnerable to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-TSUKI.title: Tsuki
WANDERER-TSUKI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Hits an additional time for each other time you've attacked this turn.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
WANDERER-KI_STRIKE.title: Ki Strike
WANDERER-ZANGEKI.title: Zangeki
WANDERER-ZANGEKI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies X times.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
WANDERER-JODAN.title: Jodan Stance
WANDERER-JODAN.description: Enter Jodan and unlock it for the rest of combat.
WANDERER-WAKI.title: Waki Stance
WANDERER-WAKI.description: Enter Waki and unlock it for the rest of combat.
WANDERER-PLUNGE.title: Plunge
WANDERER-PLUNGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw cards until you draw a non-skill card.
WANDERER-SEPPUKU.title: Seppuku
WANDERER-OFUDA.title: Ofuda
WANDERER-SEVER_KI.title: Sever Ki
WANDERER-SEVER_KI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy loses 1 Strength.
Hits X times.
WANDERER-FLOURISH.title: Flourish
WANDERER-MUSHIN.title: Mushin
WANDERER-MUSHIN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} block for each enemy.
Blocked attack damage is reflected this turn.
WANDERER-RONIN_FORM.title: Ronin Form
WANDERER-BARREL_ROLL.title: Barrel Roll
WANDERER-STEAL_PEACH.title: Steal Peach
WANDERER-MEDICINE.title: Medicine
WANDERER-MEDICINE.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} Strength.
Strength gain is doubled on [gold]Refill[/gold].
WANDERER-SWIG.title: Swig
WANDERER-SWIG.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
[gold]Shift[/gold] up to {Shift:diff()} {Shift:plural:card|cards} in your Discard pile.
WANDERER-HOLY_SMOKE.title: Holy Smoke
WANDERER-HOLY_SMOKE.description: Whenever you Exhaust a card, deal {HolySmokePower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
WANDERER-LETHAL_EXCHANGE.title: Lethal Exchange
WANDERER-LETHAL_EXCHANGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, die.
WANDERER-JUNSHI.title: Junshi
WANDERER-JUNSHI.description:
Die.
Reduce this card's cost by {Energy:energyIcons(1)} whenever ANYONE dies.
WANDERER-COUNT_REGRETS.title: Count Regrets
WANDERER-FLAUNT_SHAME.title: Flaunt Shame
WANDERER-FLAUNT_SHAME.description:
Discard ALL status cards and deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
WANDERER-IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
WANDERER-PLAY_DEAD.title: Play Dead
WANDERER-PLAY_DEAD.description:
Put all curse cards {IfUpgraded:show:|from your Draw Pile }into your Hand.
Die.
Add [purple]Dishonor[/purple] to your deck.
WANDERER-SECRET_SAUCE.title: Secret Sauce
WANDERER-SECRET_SAUCE.description:
Whenever Attacks deal damage, they also apply that much Poison.
Add [purple]Dishonor[/purple] to your deck.
WANDERER-BLINDSIDE.title: Blindside
WANDERER-BLINDSIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add [purple]Dishonor[/purple] to your deck.
WANDERER-SPIT.title: Spit
WANDERER-SPIT.description:
Apply 99 Weak.
[gold]Shift[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:and Upgrade |}{Cards:diff()} cards.
Add [purple]Dishonor[/purple] to your deck.
WANDERER-CHUG.title: Chug
WANDERER-CHUG.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Add [purple]Dishonor[/purple] to your deck.
[gold]Shift[/gold] all cards in hand.
WANDERER-RIPOSTE.title: Riposte
WANDERER-RIPOSTE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have Block, hits twice.
WANDERER-AH_TA_TA_TA_TA_TA.title: AH TATATATATA
WANDERER-AH_TA_TA_TA_TA_TA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} to a random enemy {Hits:diff()} times.
Add Replay {Replay:diff()}.
WANDERER-ZANSHIN.title: Zanshin
WANDERER-WIPE_BROW.title: Wipe Brow
WANDERER-LAST_ROUND.title: Last Round
WANDERER-FLURRY.title: Flurry
WANDERER-PLANT.title: Plant
WANDERER-STEADY_SLASH.title: Steady Slash
WANDERER-STEADY_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Reduce this card's damage by 3 whenever you leave a stance.
WANDERER-STEADY_GUARD.title: Steady Guard
WANDERER-STEADY_GUARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Reduce this card's block by 2 whenever you leave a stance.
WANDERER-FUDOSHIN.title: Fudōshin
WANDERER-FUDOSHIN.description:
You cannot leave your stance.
At the start of your turn, reenter your current stance.
WANDERER-IGNORE_SHAME.title: Ignore Shame
WANDERER-IGNORE_SHAME.description: If you Exhausted a card this turn, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
WANDERER-TARGET_HEAD.title: Target Head
WANDERER-TARGET_HEAD.description: Next turn, apply 1 [gold]Target Head[/gold] to ALL enemies.
WANDERER-TARGET_ARMS.title: Target Arms
WANDERER-TARGET_LEGS.title: Target Legs
WANDERER-BRAZEN.title: Brazen
WANDERER-BRAZEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
Discard 5 random non-attack cards from your Draw Pile.
WANDERER-GRACIOUS.title: Gracious
WANDERER-COURAGE.title: Courage
WANDERER-COURAGE.description:
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable to yourself and ALL enemies.
Remove all Weak from yourself.
WANDERER-PRUDENCE.title: Prudence
WANDERER-SINCERITY.title: Sincerity
WANDERER-SINCERITY.description: Put this card and a card from your Discard Pile on top of your Draw Pile.
WANDERER-SINCERITY.selectionScreenPrompt: Select a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
WANDERER-CUNNING.title: Cunning
WANDERER-CUNNING.description: Play and Exhaust a card from your Exhaust Pile.
WANDERER-CUNNING.selectionScreenPrompt: Select a card to play and Exhaust.
WANDERER-SEN_NO_SEN.title: Sen-no-sen
WANDERER-SEN_NO_SEN.description:
Whenever you play an attack, gain {SenNoSenPower:diff()} Block.
Costs 1 {Energy:energyIcons(1)} less for each Attack played this turn.
WANDERER-NO_PLAN.title: No Plan
WANDERER-BARIKEDO.title: Barikēdo
WANDERER-BARIKEDO.description: Up to {BarikedoPower:diff()} Block persists across turns.
WANDERER-SURIAGE.title: Suriage
WANDERER-SURIAGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
WANDERER-FLAILING.title: Flailing
WANDERER-FLAILING.description: Whenever you [gold]Shift[/gold], reduce the cost of Attacks by {Energy:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
WANDERER-BANJAKU.title: Banjaku
WANDERER-BANJAKU.description:
Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} Plating.
Costs 1 {Energy:energyIcons(1)} less for each time you've gained Block this turn.
WANDERER-THE_SPINS.title: The Spins
WANDERER-THE_SPINS.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each time you [gold]Shifted[/gold] this combat.
WANDERER-STEADY_EXCHANGE.title: Steady Exchange
WANDERER-STEADY_EXCHANGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Repeat if you haven't left a stance this turn.
WANDERER-ROOTED_STRIKE.title: Rooted Strike
WANDERER-ROOTED_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Reenter your current stance {ReenterAmount:diff()} {ReenterAmount:plural:time|times}.
WANDERER-ICHIGEKI.title: Ichigeki
WANDERER-ICHIGEKI.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each turn you've remained in your current stance.
WANDERER-SUIKYO_STRIKE.title: Suikyō Strike
WANDERER-SUIKYO_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enter a different random stance.
WANDERER-OVERFLOWING.title: Overflowing
WANDERER-OVERFLOWING.description: Whenever you play a card, enter a different random stance.
WANDERER-REPEL.title: Repel
WANDERER-OVEREXERT.title: Overexert
WANDERER-OVEREXERT.description: Play and exhaust a card from your Discard Pile.
WANDERER-OVEREXERT.selectionScreenPrompt: Select a card to play and Exhaust.
WANDERER-RETALIATE.title: Retaliate
WANDERER-RETALIATE.description: Next time you counter, it hits ALL enemies.
WANDERER-WOBBLE.title: Wobble
WANDERER-HICCUP.title: Hiccup
WANDERER-DEATH_PACT.title: Death Pact
WANDERER-DEATH_PACT.description: Next time you die, give other players 1 Intangible.
WANDERER-KIME.title: Kime
WANDERER-KIME.description: Next turn, draw 1 card and gain 2 Strength for each unique next turn power you have.
WANDERER-HIP_CHECK.title: Hip Check
WANDERER-HIP_CHECK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
On [gold]Refill[/gold], increase the damage of ALL Hip Check cards by {Increase:diff()} permanently and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
WANDERER-KIAI.title: Kiai
WANDERER-KIAI.description:
Put Kamae into your hand.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
WANDERER-SUTEMI.title: Sutemi
WANDERER-SUTEMI.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Next turn, deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Increase damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()} whenever you exhaust a card this turn.
WANDERER-KEKKAI.title: Kekkai
WANDERER-KEKKAI.description: Add [gold]Enshrined[/gold] to a card in your hand.
WANDERER-JIGOKU_JUNBI.title: Jigoku Junbi
WANDERER-JIGOKU_JUNBI.description: [gold]Next Turn[/gold] powers are not removed after being triggered.
WANDERER-MU_GAMAE.title: Mu-gamae
WANDERER-MU_GAMAE.description:
Enter a stance {Times:diff()} {Times:plural:time|times}.{IfUpgraded:show:
At the start of your turn, put this card into your hand.|}
